title: cerastium szowitsii var. glabratum
intro: Cerastium szowitsii var. glabratum, also known as the white flowered rock jasmine, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Cerastium szowitsii var. glabratum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
